pi_items.verified_value: delete/cancel the meeting from the calendar
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 74 - 'Agent should delete/cancel this meeting.' and task.json description

privileged_info_summary: The cancel_meeting task requires an agent to delete a calendar meeting titled 'Financial Planning - Bob Williams' from an Odoo 17 ERP system running at http://localhost:8069. The meeting is scheduled for 5 days from the current date at 2:00 PM (14:00) with a duration of 1.5 hours and includes Bob Williams as an attendee. The agent must authenticate using username 'admin' and password 'admin' to access the odoo_scheduling database. The task has a timeout of 300 seconds and allows a maximum of 30 steps. All data is synthetic and created by setup scripts during environment initialization.
